title: Comment from Council of State and Territorial Epidemiologists (CSTE), HHS-ONC-2025-0005, HHS-ONC-2025-0005-0001, 2025-23896
commenter_name: Council of State and Territorial Epidemiologists (CSTE)
organization: Council of State and Territorial Epidemiologists (CSTE)
comment_text: The Council of State and Territorial Epidemiologists (CSTE) respectfully submits the enclosed comments on the proposed rule, “Health Data, Technology, and Interoperability: ASTP/ONC Deregulatory Actions to Unleash Prosperity (HTI-5)”, printed in the Federal Register on December 29, 2025 (FR Vol 90, No. 245).
